title: Notifications
loadError: Cannot load notifications. Please try again.

templates.bookingCreated: {studentName} paid for a trial lesson with you. Check your schedule and get ready to teach.
templates.bookingConfirmed: Your booking with {tutorName} has been confirmed.
templates.subscriptionEnrollmentConfirmed: Your subscription with {tutorName} ({planLabel}) is now active.
templates.welcomeLinked: Welcome, {displayName}! Your Mezon account is linked. Explore tutors and book your first lesson.
templates.paymentSucceeded: Your payment for booking {bookingCode} was successful.
templates.paymentFailed: Your payment for booking {bookingCode} failed. Please try again.
templates.lessonStartingSoon: Your lesson will start in about 10 minutes at {lessonStartAt}.
templates.tutorEarningsReleased: {amount} from your {lessonKind, select, trial {trial lesson} subscription {subscription lesson} other {lesson}} is now available in your wallet.
templates.lessonComplaintApproved: Your complaint about the lesson with {tutorName} at {lessonStartAt} was approved.
templates.lessonComplaintApprovedRefunded: Your complaint about the lesson with {tutorName} at {lessonStartAt} was approved. {amount} has been credited to your wallet.
templates.lessonComplaintRejected: Your complaint about the lesson with {tutorName} at {lessonStartAt} was rejected. Reason: {reason}. Admin note: {adminNote}
templates.lessonComplaintTutorRejected: Your complaint about the lesson with {tutorName} at {lessonStartAt} was declined by the tutor. Reason: {reason}. Tutor note: {tutorNote}
templates.tutorLessonComplaintApproved: A student complaint about your lesson with {studentName} has been approved. A refund has been processed from your earnings.
templates.tutorLessonComplaintSubmitted: {studentName} filed a complaint about your lesson on {lessonStartAt} ({reason}). Please review and confirm in your dashboard.
templates.adminWithdrawalRequested: {tutorName} requested a withdrawal of {amount} to {bankName} · {bankAccountNumber}. Please review and process it.
templates.tutorWithdrawalCompleted: Your withdrawal of {amount} to {bankName} · {bankAccountNumber} has been completed.
templates.tutorWithdrawalRejected: Your withdrawal of {amount} to {bankName} · {bankAccountNumber} was declined. The amount has been returned to your available balance. Admin note: {adminNote}
